name: MoneyGram
description_short: Phoenix, AZ's MoneyGram on W McDowell Rd provides check cashing and money transfers with extended daily hours (8 AM-10 PM).
description_long:
MoneyGram's Phoenix location at 4230 W McDowell Rd provides convenient check cashing and money transfer services in the central Phoenix area. This standalone location is designed to serve the local community with quick, reliable service. The store is open from 8 AM to 10 PM every day of the week, making it accessible whether you need services early in the morning or later in the evening.

At this Phoenix MoneyGram branch on W McDowell Rd, you can cash checks, send money transfers domestically and internationally, and handle various financial transactions. For specific inquiries about fees, current exchange rates, or service availability, call the location directly at 602-415-5700. Staff can walk you through the process and answer questions about documentation requirements.

If you're a Phoenix, AZ resident needing quick check cashing without a bank account, or looking to send money to family, this W McDowell Rd location offers walk-in service with minimal wait. Bring a valid government-issued ID and the check or payment information you need to process. MoneyGram provides a trusted alternative to traditional banking for time-sensitive financial needs.
pros: 48+ documented locations throughout Phoenix covering all major neighborhoods
Partnerships with major retailers (CVS, Walmart) provide convenient co-locations with shopping
Extended hours at partner locations (most open until 9-10 PM)
Online and in-person transfer options available
Interactive map and location search by address, city, state, or ZIP code
No requirement to visit a standalone branch—accessible during routine retail shopping
cons: No fee or exchange rate information provided on their location pages, requiring customers to call or visit in person
Service quality and staff expertise likely varies significantly across partner retailers
Dependent on third-party retailer hours and policies; not independently operated
No information about transfer speed, limits, or documentation requirements on the location finder
best_for: Consumers sending or receiving domestic money transfers who value convenience and extended hours
International money transfer users already shopping at CVS or Walmart
Unbanked or underbanked individuals in Phoenix with limited access to traditional financial institutions
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for consumers seeking convenient money transfer options with flexible hours and multiple neighborhood locations, particularly those who shop regularly at CVS or Walmart. The main caveat is that pricing, transfer speeds, and service consistency are not transparent on their website and will vary by partner location—comparison shopping requires direct contact with individual outlets.
services: Location finder by address, city, state, or ZIP
Partner location network access (CVS, Walmart, check-cashing stores)
Extended-hours transfer availability through retail partners
meta_description: MoneyGram at 4230 W McDowell Rd, Phoenix, AZ. Check cashing and money transfers, open 8 AM-10 PM daily.
